title: Weigh-a-Whale
short_description: Measure the patients at a chaotic vet clinic — suggest weighing the whale in grams and she leaves a one-star review.
description: Welcome to Dr. Blubber's Very Chaotic Vet Clinic, where every patient needs measuring. Pick the sensible unit (grams for a hamster, NOT for a whale), read rulers and dial scales, and convert units — get it wrong and the offended patient leaves a devastating one-star review. Grade bands ramp from heavier/longer comparisons and g vs kg, to choosing cm/m/km and reading rulers, to unit conversions and reading scales between the tick marks. A free online measurement and units game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the correct unit or measurement reading.
